assertions.title: $1000 buy simulation
assertions.reason: buy-simulation completed on testnet and reported verified fill details (trade_events), slippage, execution latency, and gas cost.

steps.action: Derive maker credentials from cash-testnet profile and provision a separate buyer account with fallback APT transfer
steps.expected: Buyer account is distinct from maker and has enough APT despite faucet unavailability
steps.observed: Buyer account 0x947b9f8e...d9df was funded via maker transfer after faucet returned unavailable

steps.action: Run buy-simulation for $1000 USD1 market buy
steps.expected: Script executes market buy and reports fill metrics
steps.observed: Transaction 0xb49b9b49...7df1 succeeded; slippage 0.4975%; latency 821 ms; gas 0.00102500 APT

steps.action: Verify fill details from script output
steps.expected: Output includes real fill verification, not just tx success
steps.observed: Fill VERIFIED=true via trade_events, filled qty 1000.000000 CASH at 0.00010100 USD1/CASH

commands: APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted from cash-testnet> CONTRACT_ADDRESS=0xe66fef... APTOS_NETWORK=testnet BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted generated buyer key> pnpm --filter @cash/scripts buy-simulation

assertions.title: Market maker bot test
assertions.reason: market-maker-test completed with maker=cash-testnet and separate funded taker; ladder placement, verified taker fill, cancel/rebalance, and inventory tracking all succeeded.

steps.action: Provision separate taker account and fund via fallback transfer from cash-testnet maker
steps.expected: Taker can transact even when faucet is unavailable
steps.observed: Taker account 0xecdcd187...5b7e funded 0.3 APT via maker transfer; faucet failed but flow continued

steps.expected: Place 10 bid + 10 ask levels, execute taker fill, and rebalance
steps.observed: Placed 10/10 bids and asks; taker fill tx 0xfb31916f...ee49 success=true

steps.action: Check fill verification and rebalance behavior
steps.expected: Script verifies actual fill and performs inventory-aware rebalance
steps.observed: Fill VERIFIED=true via trade_events (25 CASH @ 0.00010100), cancelled 30 open orders, re-placed 10/10 ladder, report finished successfully

commands: APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted from cash-testnet> CONTRACT_ADDRESS=0xe66fef... APTOS_NETWORK=testnet TAKER_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted generated taker key> pnpm --filter @cash/scripts market-maker-test

assertions.title: Performance report
assertions.reason: performance-report output includes slippage comparison, execution time, and gas-inclusive total cost for $100/$500/$1000 buy scenarios.

steps.observed: Report generated for all three sizes with CLOB vs AMM comparison

steps.expected: Each size includes slippage, execution time, gas estimate, total cost
steps.observed: For $100/$500/$1000 sections, output includes CLOB slippage, execution time, gas estimate, and total cost (buy amount + gas)

frictions.description: Aptos testnet faucet is unavailable for programmatic funding in this environment.
frictions.resolution: Pre-funded separate buyer/taker accounts by transferring APT from cash-testnet maker and passed BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY/TAKER_PRIVATE_KEY.

frictions.description: Initial buyer top-up of 0.2 APT was insufficient for subsequent script transaction fee validation.
frictions.resolution: Reran VAL-INTEG-001 with 0.5 APT fallback transfer to buyer account before executing buy-simulation.

frictions.description: Initial attempt to transfer 3 APT from maker failed because maker balance was below transfer amount.
frictions.resolution: Reduced fallback transfer amounts to fit available maker balance and reran successfully.

summary: Revalidated 3 integration assertions via curl/script surface: VAL-INTEG-001 PASS, VAL-INTEG-002 PASS, VAL-INTEG-004 PASS.
